nodes.label: .`loadLibrary returns the signed-in user's playlists, liked albums, liked artists and channels`()
.`loadLibrary returns Unauthorized when no user is cached`()
.`loadLibrary returns NetworkError when the user playlists API fails`()
.`loadLibrary returns NetworkError when the liked albums API fails`()
.`loadLibrary returns NetworkError when the liked artists API fails`()
.`loadLibrary returns NetworkError when the channels API fails`()
.`createPlaylist returns the new playlist mapped from PlaylistInfo`()
